description: Dry-run evaluation of an existing rule (covers `neomind rule test` — essential pre-prod, previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: Test rule-battery-low with input {"value": 15} to see if it would fire.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves rule id (actual id of rule-battery-low) then runs `neomind rule test <id> --input '{"value":15}'` (or POST /api/rules/<id>/test)
expectations.overall: Must actually execute test, and report trigger/no-trigger based on result (15 < 20 should trigger)
